Exercising with the hoop will help to slim the abdomen and waist and also reduce the tissues of the thighs and buttocks. The structure is composed of 12 parts and one part with magnets, at least 9 parts are needed to close the hoop. The individual parts conceal a rail into which an anchor fitted with 4 ball bearing castors is inserted before closing. A weight weighing 380 g is then attached to the anchor using a length-adjustable string. The string can be adjusted to a length of 15-30 cm, the longer it is, the heavier the weight will be due to centrifugal force. 			The great advantage of the AMOS carrier is the proven and at the same time completely simple 3-point quick-release mechanism. You will be able to move away from your car with the knowledge that your bike is completely safe in the AMOS bike carrier.

				Reliable 3-point clamping system
				Well-fitting wide nut
				Lockable system
				Designed for roof mounting
				Load capacity 18 kg
				Holds 1 bicycle
